title: Live Scoreboard
description: All NHL games today with real-time score, period, clock, and game status.

title: Betting Odds (the-odds-api)
description: Moneyline odds from the-odds-api, implied probability, and 24h sparkline.

title: NHL Historical Game Data
description: Ingest and daily-refresh of 30-day NHL historical game records.

title: Puckline & Totals Bet Types
description: Implied cover probability, last-5 spread results, and O/U trend per game.

title: Dollar Return Calculator
description: User inputs bet amount, sees projected payout for any bet type.
